vehicle.label: Force-Feedback Haptic Glove Pair

risk.desc: Potential misalignment between sensor channels and finger linkages could lead to inaccurate flex/bend sensing.
risk.mit: Conduct thorough alignment checks during assembly and integrate sensor channels directly with finger linkages.

risk.desc: Wiring may experience fatigue due to lack of strain relief at flex boundaries.
risk.mit: Implement service loops and strain relief at every flex boundary to prevent wire fatigue.

risk.desc: Insufficient grounding scheme could lead to signal interference.
risk.mit: Specify a clear grounding scheme (e.g., star point, chassis bond) and ensure signal returns are routed alongside signals.

risk.desc: Incorrect placement of PCBs may obstruct access or cause mechanical interference.
risk.mit: Mount PCBs on standoffs with adequate clearance from walls and moving parts, ensuring connector edges face access openings.

risk.desc: Sensor connectors may not mate accurately with the dorsal control module due to manufacturing tolerances.
risk.mit: Ensure precise mating accuracy by using high-precision manufacturing processes and conducting final inspections.
